name: logo-carousel
title: Logo Carousel
author: Parable
description: A wall of N columns whose tiles flip through a shared pool of logos with a staggered vertical rotateX + y + fade swap — a single clock advances exactly one column per tick so two tiles never swap at once. Logos sit grayscale at 70% opacity and bloom to full colour on hover; under prefers-reduced-motion it collapses to a static grid of the first N logos with no cycling.
